headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .179 / .233 / .286.

nightly_recap: The Royals beat the Philadelphia Phillies, KC 15, PHI 1. Tyler Tolbert led the night, 5-5 | HR, 2B, 2 RBI in the latest Royals game. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 107.9 mph.

player_of_game.name: Tyler Tolbert
player_of_game.reason: 5-5 | HR, 2B, 2 RBI in the latest Royals game.
